news.headline: L&T Technology Services in Bengaluru opens AI Experience Zone in collaboration with NVIDIA at its design hub.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India, L&T Technology Services Limited has unveiled its advanced LTTS Experience Zone at the design hub. This cutting-edge facility showcases the latest technologies and solutions, reinforcing LTTS' commitment to innovation and customer experience.

news.headline: "K" LINE will trial Inmarsat Maritime's NexusWave service on its fleet, announced on Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: In London on October 24, 2024, it was announced that a trial of Inmarsat Maritime's new bonded network service NexusWave will be conducted by Kawasaki Kisen Kaisha, Ltd. (K LINE) on their fleet. This collaboration between K LINE and Inmarsat Maritime, a Viasat company, aims to seamlessly integrate NexusWave into K LINE's operations. This trial signifies a significant step forward in utilizing advanced network services within the maritime industry.

news.headline: Akastor ASA's DDW Offshore secures 2 contracts with an oil company for 1 year each, with option of 24 months expansion.
news.summary: In Fornebu, Norway, on October 24, 2024, a subsidiary of Akastor ASA (OSE: AKAST), DDW Offshore AS, secured two one-year contracts from an international oil company for anchor handling tug supply. These contracts also include a 24-month priced option structure each.

news.headline: Cognizant teams up with NVIDIA to improve enterprise cloud performance and cut costs through AI, data analytics. (Word count: 15)
news.summary: Teaming up with NVIDIA, Cognizant aims to utilize the power of AI and data analytics accelerators to improve enterprise cloud efficiency, boost performance, and assist clients in upgrading their infrastructure for AI integration. The collaboration, announced in Teaneck, N.J. on October 24, 2024, involves Cognizant (NASDAQ: CTSH) leveraging advanced technologies to optimize cloud expenses and readiness for AI adoption.

news.headline: Indivior reports Q3 2024 financial results, details on website. Visit www.indivior.com for more.
news.summary: Today, Indivior PLC disclosed its financial results for the period ending September 30, 2024, in both SLOUGH, United Kingdom, and RICHMOND, Va. The company, trading under Nasdaq/LSE: INDV, shared this information via a press release on Oct. 24, 2024. Those interested can access the earnings release, investor presentation, and webcast on their official website, www.indivior.com. It is a move that allows stakeholders to review the performance numbers and gain insights into the company's financial standings.

news.headline: LLCP to invest in Schülerhilfe with CEO Dieter Werkhausen and management team. Partnership announced by private equity firm.
news.summary: In Frankfurt, Germany on October 24, 2024, the private equity firm Levine Leichtman Capital Partners (LLCP) revealed their plan to invest in Schülerhilfe alongside CEO Dieter Werkhausen and the current management team. The investment marks a significant move for the company, with the exact terms of the agreement undisclosed at this time.

news.headline: Alfa Laval AB interim report shows SEK 18.9 billion in order intake, SEK 16.2 billion in net sales, and SEK 2.8 billion Adjusted EBITA.
news.summary: In Lund, Sweden, as of October 24, 2024, recent data shows significant growth in financial figures. The order intake surged to SEK 18.9 billion from the previous SEK 17.0 billion, marking a notable 15% organic increase. Similarly, net sales also saw growth, rising to SEK 16.2 billion from SEK 15.8 billion, reflecting a 6% organic increase. Additionally, the adjusted EBITA climbed by 7%, reaching SEK 2.8 billion compared to the prior SEK 2.6 billion. These positive trends indicate a strong performance and continued success in the market.

news.headline: BoJ financial system report: Japanese banks have sufficient capital bases and stable funding bases to withstand various stress events.
BoJ: The default rate of financially vulnerable firms is rising.
BoJ financial system report: It's necessary to address potential vulnerabilities appropriately and ensure the stability of Japan's financial system into the future.
BoJ maintains their view in the semi-annual financial system report.
Company buys back 10,000 of its own shares in transaction.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the annual inflation rate in the country has risen by 3.5%. This increase in inflation is higher compared to the previous year, which stood at 2.8%. The rise in prices has been primarily driven by a surge in housing costs, which have increased by 7% over the last year. Transportation costs have also gone up by 5%, contributing to the overall inflation rate. Economists predict that this upward trend in inflation may continue in the coming months, posing challenges for consumers and policymakers alike.

news.headline: Atos' accelerated safeguard plan approved by Commercial Court of Nanterre on Oct 24, 2024, after meeting all legal conditions.
news.summary: In Paris, France on October 24, 2024, Atos SE disclosed that the specialized Commercial Court of Nanterre authorized their accelerated safeguard plan on the mentioned date. The Court, following the criteria outlined in article L. 626-31 of the French Code de commerce, confirmed the fulfillment of all legal requirements for Atos. The approved safeguard plan was presented during the hearing held on October 15, 2024.

news.headline: 2024 exploration field season  successfully concluded with impressive results.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global smartphone market experienced a significant decline in sales in the second quarter of this year. The total number of smartphone shipments dropped by 12% compared to the same period last year, reaching just 300 million units. This decline is attributed to various factors, including supply chain disruptions, economic challenges, and delays in product launches due to the ongoing pandemic. Despite this downturn, some regions, such as Asia and Europe, showed more resilience in the market, with sales performing better than expected. Analysts are closely monitoring the situation to assess the potential impact on the industry in the upcoming months.

news.headline: AS Tallink Grupp will present Q3 2024 results at Investor Webinar today at 12:00 (EEST). Questions by 11:00 via email.
news.summary: AS Tallink Grupp will be presenting its Q3 2024 results at an Investor Webinar today at 12:00 (EEST). To join, click on the designated link provided. Questions should be submitted by email to investor@tallink.ee by 11:00. More information can be found in a prior announcement.

Alliance Witan transforms portfolio, appoints EdgePoint for Black Creek, achieving complete transition successfully.
Q3 and 9-month 2024 financial report released, indicates strong performance.

10-year Treasury yield hits 4.24%, highest since July, leading to clashes on future impact. S&P 500 slumps 1.24% but recovers. US yield rise double compared to Germany.
news.summary: The 10-year Treasury yield has surged to its highest point since July, reaching 4.24% on Wednesday, up from 4.204% the day before and 4.074% at the previous week's end. The yield has been steadily increasing for over a month, with a sharp uptick on Monday and continuing incremental climbs. The S&P 500 saw a 1.24% drop on Wednesday from 5,834.50 to 5,762.41 before recovering to close at 5,797.42. Economist Mohamed El-Erian noted the U.S. 10-year yield's significant 50 basis points increase this month, compared to Germany's mere 20 bps uptick, widening the yield gap to 194 bps. This rapid rise in U.S. yields has also affected global markets.

news.headline: Ipsos revenue grows by 0.5% to 591 million euros in Q3 amidst challenging business climate, with 3.3% increase to 1,730 million euros over 9 months. Operating margin target maintained at around 13%.CEO Ben Page confident in operational model and investing in AI despite slowdown.
news.summary: Ipsos, a market research company, reported a revenue of 591 million euros in the third quarter of 2024, showing a growth of 0.5%. The growth comprised -0.1% organic growth, 2.8% from acquisitions, and -2.2% from currency effects. In the first nine months of 2024, revenue reached 1,730 million euros, up by 3.3%, with organic growth at 2.4%. The CEO, Ben Page, expressed confidence in the company's operational model despite the slowdown. Ipsos aims to sustain its operating margin target of around 13%. Performance varied across markets due to an uncertain economic and geopolitical environment. The company remains focused on investing in future technologies and Artificial Intelligence to drive growth.

news.headline: Savencia reports Q3 2024 results, with revenue of $500 million and a net profit of $50 million.
KKR invests in Enilive, acquiring 25% stake to advance sustainable mobility and energy transition. Enilive focuses on biorefining and smart mobility solutions.
news.summary: London and Milan - KKR, a prominent investment firm, revealed today the acquisition of a 25% share in Enilive, Eni's mobility transformation entity focusing on biorefining, biomethane production, smart mobility solutions, and assisting mobile individuals. The agreement is pending standard regulatory clearance before finalization. Enilive, a driving force in the energy shift, aims to offer increasingly decarbonized solutions to address the changing energy landscape.

news.headline: Michael Saylor backs self-custody for Bitcoin, declares support amid criticism, stating all entities should be welcomed.
news.summary: In the face of growing criticism, MicroStrategy founder Michael Saylor voiced his backing for Bitcoin's self-custody, asserting that the cryptocurrency gains advantages from various custody methods. Saylor addressed the controversy on Wednesday, emphasizing his support for individuals who opt for self-custody. He emphasized that Bitcoin can benefit from any investment approach and should be inclusive of all types of investors. Saylor advocated for the right to self-custody for all individuals and institutions globally. Notably, he stressed the importance of freedom in choosing the form of custody and custodian. Saylor's remarks came amidst a heated discussion surrounding Bitcoin custody options.

news.headline: Essity's Q3 2024 report shows a 2.2% decrease in net sales to SEK 36,274m, with EBITA increased to SEK 5,130m, a 47% rise. Earnings per share rose to SEK 4.73 (from 2.20) for continuing operations. CEO highlights profitable growth and record cash flow. Global volume growth and market share increases were noted, with a focus on expanding customer offerings. Operating cash flow rose to SEK 6,453m, and profit for the period increased to SEK 3,329m.
news.summary: In Quarter 3 of 2024, Essity reported a 2.2% decrease in net sales to SEK 36,274m, with organic growth at 1.9%. EBITA increased significantly by 47% to SEK 5,130m, and the EBITA margin grew to 14.1%. The operating cash flow also rose by 7% to SEK 6,453m. Profit for the period reached SEK 3,329m, while earnings per share for continuing operations increased to SEK 4.73. Essity's CEO noted strong earnings, profitable growth, and record-high cash flow in the quarter, highlighting increased market shares globally. Growth was particularly robust in Health & Medical products, especially in Europe and Latin America.

news.headline: Viridien and SLB finalize data collection for a joint survey in Bonaparte Basin, Australia's offshore area.
F5 partners with NVIDIA for AI application delivery, introduces BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes. Optimizes traffic flow.
news.summary: In Seattle today, F5 (NASDAQ: FFIV) unveiled BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes, a new AI application delivery and security solution designed to assist service providers and large enterprises in managing data traffic within large-scale AI infrastructures. This innovative solution, leveraging high-performance NVIDIA BlueField-3 DPUs, offers a centralized control point to accelerate, secure, and streamline data flow in and out of these infrastructures. This innovation aims to enhance efficiency and control in managing data center traffic.

news.headline: Zoho Corp to use NVIDIA NeMo for LLMs, made available to 700,000+ customers globally.
news.summary: In Mumbai, India, Zoho Corporation, a tech company based in Chennai, revealed its plan to utilize the NVIDIA AI accelerated computing platform for developing and implementing its large language models (LLMs) in SaaS applications. This includes leveraging NVIDIA NeMo from NVIDIA AI Enterprise software. These LLMs will eventually be accessible to the company's 700,000+ customers worldwide across ManageEngine and Zoho.com. This strategic move aims to enhance customer experience and improve overall efficiency.

news.headline: Åland Bank announces 2025 financial data and AGM details.
Vaisala's AGM and financial report for 2025 to be announced, with key numbers kept confidential.
Huhtamäki Oyj's interim report for Jan 1-Sep 30, 2024 shows strong profitability amid market growth.
ONWARD Medical raises EUR 50M in capital increase with Ottobock SE's cornerstone investment.
news.summary: ONWARD® Medical has recently completed a successful capital increase, raising a total of EUR 50 million. This amount exceeded the initial target, indicating strong investor interest. The capital increase was further bolstered by a substantial investment from Ottobock SE & Co. KGaA, a key player in the industry. This significant financial backing is expected to facilitate ONWARD® Medical's growth and development initiatives moving forward.

news.headline: Danone shows strong performance in Q3; Sustaining quality growth.
APRU & IRIDeS launched Multi-Hazards Program to improve disaster risk knowledge. In 2023, 21% more disasters led to 86,743 fatalities.
news.summary: In 2023, there was a 21% increase in natural disasters compared to 2013, leading to 86,743 deaths based on the Emergency Events Database. In response to this alarming data, the Association of Pacific Rim Universities (APRU) and the International Research Institute of Disaster Science (IRIDeS) at Tohoku University has initiated the Multi-Hazards (MH) Program. This program aims to utilize the research expertise of APRU member universities to advance understanding of disaster risk reduction and share effective practices.

news.headline: Analyst predicts Bitcoin hitting $92K if Trump wins; merger arb-style math could make it a reality.
news.summary: According to Jeff Park, the likelihood of a Bitcoin surge to $92,000 could be influenced by a Trump win, relying on "merger arb-style probability math."

news.headline: Eramet reports Q3 2024 adjusted revenue at €809m.
NCCN recommends Novartis' ribociclib (Kisqali®) as preferred adjuvant breast cancer treatment, applicable to various patient profiles.
news.summary: Recently, the NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology updated to recommend ribociclib (Kisqali®) as a Category 1 preferred CDK4/6 inhibitor (CDK4/6i) adjuvant therapy for patients with hormone receptor-positive/human epidermal growth factor receptor 2-negative (HR+/HER2-) early breast cancer (EBC) when combined with an aromatase inhibitor (AI). This recommendation applies to all node-positive diseases and patients with no nodal involvement but possessing high-risk disease characteristics like a tumor size greater than 5 cm, or tumors sized 2-5 cm with a Grade 2 status along with high genomic risk/Ki-67 ≥20% or Grade 3. Ribociclib (Kisqali) stands out as the sole CDK4/6i advised for these specific scenarios.

news.headline: ECB policymakers have differing opinions on future directions.
TGS ASA declares quarterly dividend of NOK 1.53 per share (USD 0.14) for Q4 2024.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway on October 24, 2024, TGS ASA's Board announced the approval to distribute a quarterly dividend of USD 0.14 per share (NOK 1.53 per share) for Q4 2024, as per the authorization received during the Annual General Meeting held on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Sodexo's Fiscal 2024 reports organic revenue growth of +7.9%, underlying operating profit +16%, net debt/EBITDA 1.7x, proposed dividend of 2.65 euros, with Fiscal 2025 guidance of organic growth between +5.5% to +6.5%. Key figures include revenue at 23.8 billion euros, net debt reduced to 2.6 billion euros, and net profit from continuing operations up +31.8% to 738 million euros. Chairwoman Sophie Bellon highlights strong operational execution and sustainable growth. Commercial momentum, sustainability goals, and governance details outlined. Revenue breakdown by region shows North America +8.7%, Europe +7.2%, Rest of the World +7.3%. Operating profit up in all regions, with Fiscal 2025 outlook expecting sustained growth and margin improvement. Conference call held to discuss results. Shares and contacts details provided.
news.summary: Sodexo reported strong financial performance in Fiscal 2024 with organic revenue growth at 7.9%, underlying operating profit up by 16%, and a net debt/EBITDA ratio of 1.7x. The proposed dividend is 2.65 euros, up 17.8%. Fiscal 2025 guidance includes organic growth between +5.5% and +6.5% and an improvement in operating profit margin between +30 to +40 bps.The company generated revenues of 23.8 billion euros in Fiscal 2024, up 5.1% year-on-year. North America saw growth of +8.7%, Europe +7.2%, and Rest of the World +7.3%. Sustainability efforts also saw progress, including reductions in greenhouse gas emissions and improvements in workforce safety and retention.Sodexo's net profit from continuing operations was 738 million euros, up 31.8%, with underlying net profit reaching 775 million euros, up 17.6%. The company also achieved milestones in client signings, retention, and commercial momentum. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Hydro decreases ownership in Vianode to 19.9% from 30% in Norway graphite producer.
news.summary: Hydro has made the decision to decrease its stake in the Norwegian-based synthetic graphite producer, Vianode, from 30 percent to 19.9 percent.
